title: App Settings - General - Account - Invite sent, user logs during the installation, not registered on Cloud
scenario: IT admin invite not accepted via laptop results in missing tenant info on General/Account screen for mobile-only user
steps: 1. IT admin sends an invite to a mobile user via an outside source (e.g., laptop).
2. On the mobile device, install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. During onboarding, log in with the invited user's credentials.
4. Navigate to the Account screen (Home → Account).
expected: The user should be fully registered on the cloud with a tenant. The account card should display Tenant ID and Tenant Name rows, indicating the user is associated with the tenant they were invited to.
